description: Partnership contract. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Dating: Mentions 1428 Seleucid, which is 1116/17 CE (but this is not necessarily the date of the document). Fragment of agreement between three individuals, in which the agent is allowed to do business in the Egyptian Rīf (countryside), in Damietta, in Tinnīs, and in Alexandria—but nowhere else. The agent is Shela ha-Levi, and the investors are Netanel and Shelomo. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: חוזה שותפות; בכתב יד חלפון בן מנשה; 1116/17 לספירה; הסכם בין שלשה: שלה הלוי כסוכן ונתנאל ושלמה כמשקיעים; הסוכן רשאי לסחור ברי'ף, דמיאט, תניס ואלכסנדריה
